title: Clinical Co-Pilot Claim
description: One unit of model output. The model emits an object with a 'claims' list of these plus optional ordering metadata (ARCHITECTURE.md §2.1). This schema, not the PHP Claim class, is the contract for V1. V2 re-checks that any claim naming an analyte/medication/number/date/patient-attribute cites, regardless of its declared claim_type — the four zero-citation types are a ceiling, not a bypass.

ordering.description: optional emphasis/ordering metadata (claim identifiers or indices); NOT verified — emphasis/ordering is a stated §2.4 residual

text.description: the claim prose; V4 extracts every number/date from THIS field (authoritative), not from numeric_values

claim_type.description: closed enum. greeting|refusal|retrieval_status|uncertainty_statement may carry zero citations (only when not lexically clinical); every other type MUST cite (V2).

citation_ids.description: fact_id references; each MUST resolve to a fact in the session fact set (V2) and belong to the pinned pid (V3)

numeric_values.description: numbers the model declares it is asserting; advisory only — V4 grounds against claim text. Numbers or numeric strings are both accepted and coerced.

flags.description: claim-level flags; 'conflict' acknowledgment for any cited conflict-flagged fact lives here (V6)

order_rank.description: optional per-claim ordering rank; NOT verified (§2.4 residual)

emphasis.description: optional per-claim emphasis marker; NOT verified (§2.4 residual)
